opening_line: Stairwell B doesn't end. I've climbed forty flights. I'm still on floor six. Send someone who believes me.
notes_for_player: Stairwell feed shows repeated landing segment.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Stairwell B, south tower. I started at six. I'm still at six.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Twenty minutes of stairs. My knees—look, just seal it off.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Camera's useless. It loops. Same step. Same rust stain. Over and over.
